nasb.text: But she was very perplexed at this statement, and kept pondering what kind of salutation this was.

esv.text: But she was greatly troubled at the saying, and tried to discern what sort of greeting this might be.

cnv.text: 她卻因這話驚慌起來，反覆思想這樣祝賀是甚麼意思。

ccb.text: 玛丽亚听了觉得十分困惑，反复思想这话的意思。

csbs.text: 玛丽亚因这话就惊慌不安，思索这问候到底是什么意思。
